arts.ttl: Michael Owen details Real Madrid's Champions League problem with Man City and Liverpool
arts.sum: The ex-Liverpool and Real Madrid ace delivers his thoughts on who might win Europe's biggest competition as it gets underway again

arts.ttl: Real Madrid leading the way: Which club has won the most Champions Leagues?
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes a closer look at which club have won the European Cup/Champions League the most often.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Stuttgart: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid face VfB Stuttgart on Tuesday evening as they begin the defence of their Champions League crown. Here is 90min's guide to Real Madrid vs Stuttgart this Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief hands Man City, Real Madrid additional Jamal Musiala transfer boost
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl admits that it will be "difficult" to agree a contract extension with Manchester City and Real Madrid-linked Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Five reasons why VfB Stuttgart will beat Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Early on in the campaign, Stuttgart beat Borussia Dortmund 2-1 at home, before earning a 2-0 triumph a month later in the round of 16 of the DFB Cup. VfB went on to do the triple over Edin Terzić’s side, winning the third and final meeting between the two 1-0 in April, thanks to a goal from Serhou Guirassy . Sebastian Hoeneß’s VfB Stuttgart side have all the tools to produce an upset when they face reigning UEFA Champions League holders Real Madrid on Matchday 1 of this season's revamped competition.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Man City Champions League 2024-25 favourites, Arsenal dark horses
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at who are the favourites to win the 2024-25 Champions League and who are the teams to watch.

arts.ttl: Nacho: “In my family, we are Madrid fans for life, we will always want Real Madrid to win”
arts.sum: But this year, I don’t know, as the weeks and months have gone by, even though it’s been a year when things were going more or less well, because I think that in the whole season we only lost two games... Former Real Madrid captain Nacho Fernandez spoke about all sorts of things in a recent interview with Relevo.

arts.ttl: Dani Carvajal rates chances of Ballon d'Or thanks to trophy-laden 2024
arts.sum: Carvajal won La Liga, the Champions League and Euro 2024. Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal has backed himself as a contender for the 2024 Ballon d'Or, having been named on the 30-player shortlist for football's top individual award.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Stuttgart injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Real Madrid and Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Sami Khedira: "Stuttgart must be brave against Real Madrid"
arts.sum: Sami Khedira has told former club Stuttgart they need to “be courageous” when they face Kylian Mbappé, Jude Bellingham and European title-holders Real Madrid in Tuesday’s UEFA Champions League opener. The former Germany international midfielder moved to Madrid at the end of that season, going on to play over 100 competitive games for Real and win both the La Liga title and the Champions League with them.
